yacl3.config.tsunderify:config.swearRepl: If enabled, swears will be replaced or removed by the transformer.
yacl3.config.tsunderify:config.suffixCha: The chance for a suffix to be added to the end of a message, set to 0 to disable.
yacl3.config.tsunderify:config.stutterCh: The chance for stutter to be added to the start of a message, set to 0 to disable.
yacl3.config.tsunderify:config.tsunifyOn:
If enabled, messages you send using the enter key will be tsunderified.

§eWARNING: Tsunderify all messages may edit a message already tsunderified by the keybind!
yacl3.config.tsunderify:config.specialKe: The tsunderify key will automatically send the message if enabled.
yacl3.config.tsunderify:config.transform: If enabled, commands sent by other mods will be transformed.
The portion of the message that matches any of these regexes will not be transformed.
